summary: Iteration 7 (routers refactor + bulk upload + image optimization) — ALL TESTS PASS. Backend: 22/22 pytest cases pass covering (a) regression across every previously passing endpoint after the 7-router refactor (GET /api/, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/inquiries, GET /api/admin/inquiries with/without auth, GET /api/blog/public, GET /api/packages/public, GET /api/packages/{id}/pdf returns valid %PDF bytes, GET /api/albums/public, POST /api/newsletter, GET /api/admin/stats), (b) NEW image optimization on /api/admin/upload — a 3000x2000 JPG (~94KB) is downsized to <=1600px wide AND converted to WebP (file ends .webp, optimized=true, output much smaller than input, verified by re-downloading and inspecting with Pillow), (c) small PNG (400x300) still converted to WebP, (d) GIF upload preserves .gif extension (optimized=false), (e) NEW /api/admin/upload/bulk: 401 without auth, multi-file mix returns {uploaded:[...],errors:[...],count:N}, invalid file types reported in errors[], >20 files returns 400, (f) module structure verified — server.py is 165 lines (<400), all 7 router files exist at /app/backend/routers/, /app/backend/core/deps.py exists. Frontend: confirmed via Playwright — admin login works, /admin/gallery/new shows UploadDropzone with 'Drag & drop photos here' label and 'click to browse · auto-converted to WebP @ 1600px' help text, hidden multi-file input has data-testid='dropzone-file-input', selecting 3 PNGs triggers bulk upload through /api/admin/upload/bulk, the in-flight progress UI 'Uploading X of Y' is visible during upload, all 3 thumbnails appear in the image grid with .webp src URLs (e.g. /api/uploads/<uuid>.webp) and the first is auto-marked Cover, the 'Add URL' input still works (4th image appended), 'Uploaded 3 images' success toast shown. Existing editors verified: data-testid 'blog-cover-upload' present on /admin/blog/new, 'pkg-hero-upload' and 'pkg-gallery-upload' present on /admin/packages/umrah-economy/edit.
critical_code_review_comments: uploads.py: ALLOWED_EXT check is still extension-based (no MIME magic-byte sniffing). User can rename hello.txt to hello.png to bypass type check; Pillow will then fail to open and the except-Exception fallback writes the raw text bytes to disk as <uuid>.png. Recommend either (a) verify Pillow can open() before saving (and reject if it cannot), or (b) drop the fallback for non-GIF types — only successful WebP-optimized bytes should be written.
uploads.py: bulk endpoint reads each file fully into memory sequentially. For 20x10MB worst case that's 200MB peak. Consider streaming or imposing a smaller per-batch byte budget.

uploads.py: _save_one is fully synchronous (Pillow encode + blocking disk write) inside an async route — under concurrent uploads this can block the event loop. Consider running _optimize_to_webp inside asyncio.to_thread / run_in_executor.

server.py CORS: allow_credentials=False with allow_origins from env (defaulting to '*'). If cookies/auth are ever needed across origins this needs reconfiguration; not blocking for current Bearer-token auth.
core/deps.py imports re/uuid at the bottom of the file (after the get_current_admin function). Cosmetic — move all imports to the top.

UploadDropzone.jsx single-file branch uses /admin/upload (single) instead of /admin/upload/bulk. This is fine, but the helper text says 'auto-converted to WebP @ 1600px' which the single endpoint also satisfies — no inconsistency, just noting both paths are exercised.

Frontend UploadDropzone shows progress per 20-file chunk only (not per-file within a chunk). Acceptable, but with 20 files per chunk the UI jumps from 0→20 in one update. Consider XHR upload events or streaming for finer granularity (optional polish).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (dropzone visible, multi-upload + progress + grid + URL-add all verified; existing pkg-hero-upload, pkg-gallery-upload, blog-cover-upload testids confirmed present)

test_credentials: admin@babatour.com / BabaTour2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — LOGIN 200 OK, seed_admin works as designed (creates or password-updates existing admin).
seed_data_creation: Tests upload disposable PNG/JPG/GIF bytes generated in-memory with Pillow per run; UI test uploaded 3 small PNGs into a draft New Album (form was NOT saved, so no DB rows created). All uploaded files persist on disk under /app/backend/uploads/ with UUID names and do not pollute admin UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 is fully green. test_iter7_refactor.py covers regression + new features and runs in ~4.5s. The dropzone flow on /admin/gallery/new is the canonical pattern — UploadDropzone is also a good candidate to be wired into Package/Blog editors in a future iteration (currently they still use the older UploadButton). To extend tests: add a real >1600px PNG test (current test uses 400x300) and assert width after re-download; we already do this for the 3000x2000 JPG case.
